seoTitle: Curlewis vs Curra Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Curlewis and Curra Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Curlewis vs Curra Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Curlewis and Curra Creek.
heading: Curlewis vs Curra Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Curlewis, New South Wales and Curra Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Curra Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Curlewis (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Curlewis or Curra Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Curlewis has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Curra Creek scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Curlewis scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Curra Creek scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Curlewis or Curra Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Curra Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
